name: How do I make my **LA law firm** visible in Google AI Overviews for personal injury cases?
description: **Prioritize peer recognitions and structured data; AI ignores most firm sites.**[1][3]

mainEntity.name: How do I make my **LA law firm** visible in Google AI Overviews for personal injury cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Prioritize peer recognitions and structured data; AI ignores most firm sites.**[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Optimize for third-party authority signals and structured data that AI trusts over self-published content.** About 60% of searches end without clicks, favoring verified recognitions in AI summaries.[1] Firms with peer-reviewed distinctions appear consistently across platforms.[3]

**Key factors:**
- Peer rankings (Super Lawyers, Best Lawyers)
- Consistent mentions in trusted directories
- Structured website data
- Matching PR and site language

**Review what AI currently surfaces about you, then build recognitions and optimize bios.** Avoid templated content.[1] **This positions LA firms ahead in competitive AI discovery.**
